market_regime.crude_note: Brent $97.76 intraday recovery after overnight spike. Below $100 is constructive but well above $90 threshold for regime relief. Watch for sustained break <$95 as signal of partial resolution.
market_regime.regime_note: Regime shifted slightly from CEASEFIRE_COLLAPSE to CEASEFIRE_UNCERTAIN_HORMUZ_BINARY. Brent intraday crash (-4.07%) suggests commercial/diplomatic signals, not a full regime change. Watch: sustained Brent break <$95 = TALKS_REVIVING shift; Brent back >$100 = collapse confirmation.

opening_bias_actual.gift_nifty_note: GIFT Nifty at 02:24 IST showed ~24,433 (prev close 24,364), signalling a modest positive bias overnight — ~100pts above EOD forecast (24,330)
opening_bias_actual.scoring_note: Forecast FLAT_TO_SLIGHT_GAP_DOWN (-0.2%). Actual gap +0.055% (24391.5 vs prev close 24378.1). The FLAT portion of the forecast was CORRECT — magnitude is tiny (<0.1%). The SLIGHT_GAP_DOWN directional bias was WRONG — market opened slightly positive. Overnight: Trump extended ceasefire (positive) but Iran seized 2 ships in Hormuz (negative) — net tiny positive. Brent re-spiked +3.14% to $101.57, negating some tailwind. Graded PARTIAL: regime (flat) correct, directional tilt flipped, magnitude within noise band.
